calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Oct-29-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: K. Farnsworth.
Plaintiff: Jesus Edgar Beltran, present in pro per with Spanish Interpreter: Elizabeth Angulo.
Plaintiff and Interpreter were sworn and examind.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, matter is submitted and taken under submission.
Plaintiff to prepare a Proposed Judgment.

10-29-07
Proposed Judgment rec'd in court.
The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Alina Gonzalez Laguna in the sum of $283,385.00 plus Interest at 10% per year.
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
